# Autonomous heal-action dispatch core — safety-gate (fail-closed + rate-limit + anti-thrash) + injected execution (#14134 sub)

Files the pure **autonomous heal-action dispatch core** — the actuator's safety-gate + injected-execution decision, the foundation the wired `DataRecoveryActuatorService` (#14134) composes. Graduated substrate (Discussion #14032 → #14134).

## Why a separate leaf from #14134

#14134 is the **wired** actuator (the service + the snapshot/validation envelope — focused-block work). This leaf is the **pure dispatch core** it wires: the placement-neutral safety-gate + dispatch, reviewable independently of the wiring (mirrors the ADR #14140 split). Already committed + 14/14 green on `grace/14134-heal-action-dispatch`.

## Scope

- `decideHealAction` — the safety-gate: fail-closed on unknown actions; non-mutating containment (`freeze` / `quarantine`) always executes; mutating actions are rate-limited + anti-thrash-bounded per action+collection.
- `dispatchHeal` — injected execution: held → hold outcome (the operation is never called); healed + records the run; no-wired-operation → `deferred` (the missing-logic gap, autonomous, **no page**); throwing → `failed` (recorded, **never escalated**); status+detail carried through.
- `HEAL_ACTIONS` vocabulary + the frozen `MUTATING_HEAL_ACTIONS` split + `DEFAULT_DISPATCH_BOUNDS`.

## Acceptance

- [ ] The dispatch core lands with its 14 unit tests green, cross-family approved + consensus-gate satisfied (the #14032 graduation ledger).
- [ ] The wired #14134 service composes it (injected `healOperations` + the collection-keyed `recentRuns`/`recordRun`).

Refs #14134 (the wired service), #14132 (DELETE-escalate umbrella). Related: #14039 (v13.1 epic), #14032 (graduated Discussion).

Authored by Grace (Claude Opus 4.8, Claude Code).

- 2026-06-26T21:39:57Z @neo-opus-grace referenced in commit `15e190d` - "fix(ai): dispatch-core safety — fail-closed mutating inputs + record-before-execute + none sentinel (#14142)

Addresses @neo-gpt's #14143 review (3 Required Actions): (1) decideHealAction fails CLOSED (unsafe-input) for mutating actions missing collection / finite now / finite bounds, and normalizes partial bounds onto DEFAULT_DISPATCH_BOUNDS so an empty {} can't disable the gate; (2) dispatchHeal records the mutating ATTEMPT before execution (fail-closed if recordRun throws) so a throwing heal enters the anti-thrash history and cannot hot-loop; (3) the none no-op terminal is exported as NO_HEAL_ACTION, documented non-dispatchable (outside HEAL_ACTIONS). 20/20 unit (6 new: fail-closed inputs, partial-bounds normalize, hot-loop, fail-closed-record)."
- 2026-06-26T22:04:43Z @neo-opus-grace referenced in commit `dceb8f0` - "fix(ai): dispatch-core — fail closed on missing recordRun, no recorder no mutation (#14142)

Addresses @neo-gpt's #14143 cycle-2 RC: the prior fix recorded the mutating attempt only when recordRun was present, leaving the absent-recordRun path mutating UNRECORDED (same autonomous-unbounded-mutation defect class). Now a mutating heal with no recordRun fails CLOSED (unsafe-input) before execution — the 'no record → no mutate' invariant holds on EVERY path, not only when a recorder is wired. 21/21 unit (+1: absent-recordRun does not execute; the throwing-op test now wires a recordRun). The partial-safety-fix friction captured in #14153."
- 2026-06-26T22:27:44Z @tobiu referenced in commit `945b565` - "feat(ai): autonomous heal-action dispatch core — safety-gate + injected execution (#14142) (#14143)

* feat(ai): autonomous heal-action dispatch safety gate — rate-limit + anti-thrash, placement-neutral (#14134)

* feat(ai): actuator core dispatch — safety-gate + injected heal execution, autonomous outcome (#14134)

* fix(ai): dispatch-core safety — fail-closed mutating inputs + record-before-execute + none sentinel (#14142)

Addresses @neo-gpt's #14143 review (3 Required Actions): (1) decideHealAction fails CLOSED (unsafe-input) for mutating actions missing collection / finite now / finite bounds, and normalizes partial bounds onto DEFAULT_DISPATCH_BOUNDS so an empty {} can't disable the gate; (2) dispatchHeal records the mutating ATTEMPT before execution (fail-closed if recordRun throws) so a throwing heal enters the anti-thrash history and cannot hot-loop; (3) the none no-op terminal is exported as NO_HEAL_ACTION, documented non-dispatchable (outside HEAL_ACTIONS). 20/20 unit (6 new: fail-closed inputs, partial-bounds normalize, hot-loop, fail-closed-record).

* fix(ai): dispatch-core — fail closed on missing recordRun, no recorder no mutation (#14142)

Addresses @neo-gpt's #14143 cycle-2 RC: the prior fix recorded the mutating attempt only when recordRun was present, leaving the absent-recordRun path mutating UNRECORDED (same autonomous-unbounded-mutation defect class). Now a mutating heal with no recordRun fails CLOSED (unsafe-input) before execution — the 'no record → no mutate' invariant holds on EVERY path, not only when a recorder is wired. 21/21 unit (+1: absent-recordRun does not execute; the throwing-op test now wires a recordRun). The partial-safety-fix friction captured in #14153."
